_meta.description: Universities in Uttarakhand — manually curated with verified data
_meta.notes: Fees are approximate annual figures in INR unless noted. null = data not available. Placement data is self-reported by universities.

universities.university_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh
universities.placement_notes: MBBS median salary INR 8.5 LPA; MD/MS median salary INR 24.1 LPA (NIRF 2024 report). Most graduates enter government hospital service.
CSE highest 32 LPA, CSE avg 13.57 LPA. BTech avg 10.27 LPA, MTech avg 7.33 LPA. BTech placement rate ~80%, MTech ~45%. (2024 data)

PhD/FPM.notes: Fully funded with stipend as per GoI norms

universities.placement_notes: MBA 2025: highest 33.12 LPA, avg 14.95 LPA, median 14.46 LPA. 433 out of 480 students sought placement, 10 unplaced. 190+ recruiters. Top sectors: IT (26%), Marketing & Sales (21%).
UG 4-year median 4.5 LPA, PG 5-year median 5.5 LPA (2024). Top recruiters: TCS, HCL, Cognizant, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Infosys.
2022-2024 batch: highest 9.5 LPA, avg ~5.7 LPA. Top recruiters: ITC Limited, JK Paper Mill, Orient Paper Mill, Naini Papers, Proklean.

universities.university_name: Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology
Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University
Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University

MBBS.note: Govt college fee; private affiliated colleges range up to 15 lakh total

BDS.note: Govt college fee; private affiliated colleges range up to 9 lakh total

B.Sc Nursing.note: Varies by affiliated college; range 1.8-9 lakh total

MD.note: Govt college; range 2.37-15.57 lakh across colleges

MS.note: Govt college; range 2.37-15.57 lakh across colleges

universities.notes: Affiliating university for 16 medical/dental/nursing/paramedical colleges across Uttarakhand. Fees vary significantly by college (govt vs private). Govt college MBBS fee ~1.45 lakh/year.

universities.university_name: Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry

B.Sc Horticulture.note: Fee range 67,084-1,22,456 total depending on category

universities.notes: Niche agricultural university with two campuses — Bharsar (Horticulture) and Ranichauri (Forestry). No centralized placements; alumni typically pursue govt jobs, banking, or cooperative sector. Fee structure is very affordable as a state government university.

universities.university_name: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies
courses_offered: B.Sc Hons Economics with Data Science (3+1)
MBA (AI for Business) - with EY India
MBA (Investment Banking & Capital Markets) - with EY India
MBA (Strategic Financial Management) - with EY India
universities.nirf_ranking: Overall #64, University #45, Engineering #43, Management #36, Law #18, Research #45
universities.notes: 2025 placements: 92% placement rate, 2444 students placed, 800+ recruiters. Highest CTC 52 LPA (Computer Science). Top 10% avg in CS: 42 LPA. MBA peak: 29 LPA. Law highest: 22.5 LPA. Hostel fee 1.70L/year (regular); AC attached washroom: 2.13L/year.

universities.university_name: Graphic Era Deemed to be University
universities.notes: 2025 placements: 655 of 916 B.Tech students placed. B.Tech CSE highest: 61.99 LPA, median: 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters: Amazon, Infosys, Oracle, TCS, Microsoft, Adobe. Hostel fee ranges 78K-2.14L depending on room type; boys 1.26L-2.14L, girls 1.10L-2.07L.

2023-24 placements: 69.3% rate, 1500+ offers, median salary 5.7 LPA. Highest: 58 LPA (B.Tech CSE). Top recruiters: Palo Alto, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, KPMG, IBM. Hostel fee: boys ~1.43L, girls ~1.48L-1.63L (10 months, includes mess).

BA.note: Varies by specialization; some as low as 5,000/year

universities.notes: Historic Vedic institution founded 1902 by Swami Shraddhanandaji. NIRF 2025 data: 90 students placed, UG median 3.9 LPA, B.Tech highest 12 LPA (Stellaraa Edutech). Hostel 55K-62K/year. Government-funded deemed university with very affordable fees.

courses_offered: Diploma in Media Graphics & Video Editing
universities.notes: India's first yoga-focused deemed university, spread over 76.8 acres. Hostel fee bundled into course fee for some programs (18K-34K/semester including food and maintenance). 6 hostels including international hostel. NIRF 2025 median salary: 3 LPA. Recruiters include Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Apollo Hospitals, MakeMyTrip. All UG programs are 4-year Hons; all fees are per semester.
